channel.title: GitHub HCL Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: alijahnas/CKA-practice-exercises
item.description: This is a guide for passing the CNCF Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) with practice exercises. Good luck!

item.title: futurice/terraform-examples
item.description: Terraform samples for all the major clouds you can copy and paste. The future, co-created.

item.title: openshift/okd
item.description: The self-managing, auto-upgrading, Kubernetes distribution for everyone

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-example-foundation
item.description: Example repo showing how the CFT modules can be composed to build a secure cloud foundation.

item.title: hashicorp/terraform-guides
item.description: Example usage of HashiCorp Terraform

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kubernetes-engine
item.description: A Terraform module for configuring GKE clusters.

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-security-group
item.description: Terraform module which creates EC2-VPC security groups on AWS

item.title: stacksimplify/terraform-on-aws-ec2
item.description: Terraform On AWS for EC2, VPC, ASG, ALB, CLB, NLB, CloudWatch, SNS, S3, CodePipeline, ACM, Route53

item.title: stacksimplify/terraform-iacdevops-with-aws-codepipeline
item.description: Implement Terraform IAC DevOps for AWS Project with AWS CodePipeline

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
item.description: Terraform module which creates VPC resources on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
item.description: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations

item.title: antonputra/tutorials
item.description: DevOps by Example

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-alb
item.description: Terraform module to create an AWS Application/Network Load Balancer (ALB/NLB) and associated resources

item.title: hashicorp/consul-guides
item.description: Example usage of HashiCorp Consul

item.title: hashicorp/nomad-guides
item.description: Example usage of HashiCorp Nomad

item.title: hashicorp/terraform-aws-nomad-starter
item.description: Terraform Module for Provisioning Nomad on AWS

item.title: hashicorp/terraform-aws-consul-starter
item.description: A Terraform module for creating an OSS Consul cluster as described by the HashiCorp reference architecture.

item.title: hashicorp/learn-terraform-import
item.description: Learn how to import existing configuration into Terraform

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
item.description: Terraform module to create an Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) cluster and associated worker instances on AWS

item.title: stacksimplify/hashicorp-certified-terraform-associate
item.description: Hashicorp Certified Terraform Associate
